# harness_platform_iacm_ansible_inventory (Resource)

Resource for managing Harness IaCM Ansible Inventories.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "harness_platform_iacm_ansible_inventory" "manual" {
  identifier = "my_inventory"
  name       = "my-inventory"
  org_id     = harness_platform_organization.example.id
  project_id = harness_platform_project.example.id
  type       = "manual"
  tags       = ["env:prod"]

  groups {
    identifier = "web"
    name       = "web"
    hosts      = ["web-1.example.com", "web-2.example.com"]
    vars {
      key        = "ansible_user"
      value      = "ubuntu"
      value_type = "string"
    }
  }

  vars {
    key        = "ansible_port"
    value      = "22"
    value_type = "string"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `identifier` (String) Unique identifier of the resource.
- `name` (String) Name of the resource.
- `org_id` (String) Unique identifier of the organization.
- `project_id` (String) Unique identifier of the project.
- `type` (String) Type of inventory. One of: manual, dynamic, plugin.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the resource.
- `dynamic_groups` (Block Set) Dynamic groups used when type is dynamic. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--dynamic_groups))
- `groups` (Block Set) Manual groups used when type is manual. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--groups))
- `plugin_options` (Block List, Max: 1) Plugin options used when type is plugin. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--plugin_options))
- `tags` (Set of String) Tags to associate with the resource.
- `vars` (Block Set) Variables configured on the inventory. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--vars))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--dynamic_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dynamic_groups`

Required:

- `connector_identifier` (String) Connector identifier used by the dynamic group.
- `connector_type` (String) Connector type (e.g. workspace, aws, gcp, azure, vault).
- `identifier` (String) Identifier of the dynamic group.
- `name` (String) Name of the dynamic group.

Optional:

- `configuration` (Block List, Max: 1) Configuration for the dynamic group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--dynamic_groups--configuration))
- `dynamic_vars` (Block Set) Dynamic variables for the dynamic group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--dynamic_groups--dynamic_vars))
- `vars` (Block Set) Variables for the dynamic group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--dynamic_groups--vars))

<a id="nestedblock--dynamic_groups--configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dynamic_groups.configuration`

Optional:

- `host_address_attribute` (String) Host address attribute.
- `resource_type` (String) Resource type to select.
- `selectors` (Block List) Resource selectors. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--dynamic_groups--configuration--selectors))

<a id="nestedblock--dynamic_groups--configuration--selectors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dynamic_groups.configuration.selectors`

Required:

- `attribute` (String) Attribute to filter on.
- `operator` (String) Operator for the filter.
- `value` (String) Value for the filter.



<a id="nestedblock--dynamic_groups--dynamic_vars"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dynamic_groups.dynamic_vars`

Required:

- `key` (String) Key is the identifier for the variable.
- `value` (String) Value of the variable. For secret value types this must be a Harness secret reference.
- `value_type` (String) Value type. One of: string, secret.

Optional:

- `file_name` (String) Filename to store the value in (used for file-backed variables).


<a id="nestedblock--dynamic_groups--vars"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dynamic_groups.vars`

Required:

- `key` (String) Key is the identifier for the variable.
- `value` (String) Value of the variable. For secret value types this must be a Harness secret reference.
- `value_type` (String) Value type. One of: string, secret.

Optional:

- `file_name` (String) Filename to store the value in (used for file-backed variables).



<a id="nestedblock--groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `groups`

Required:

- `identifier` (String) Identifier of the group.
- `name` (String) Name of the group.

Optional:

- `hosts` (List of String) List of hosts in the group.
- `vars` (Block Set) Variables for the group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--groups--vars))

<a id="nestedblock--groups--vars"></a>
### Nested Schema for `groups.vars`

Required:

- `key` (String) Key is the identifier for the variable.
- `value` (String) Value of the variable. For secret value types this must be a Harness secret reference.
- `value_type` (String) Value type. One of: string, secret.

Optional:

- `file_name` (String) Filename to store the value in (used for file-backed variables).



<a id="nestedblock--plugin_options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `plugin_options`

Optional:

- `inline_yaml` (String) Inline plugin inventory YAML content (when source_type is inline).
- `provider_connector_identifier` (String) Provider connector identifier for plugin inventory execution.
- `provider_connector_type` (String) Provider connector type.
- `repository` (String) Git repository name (when source_type is git).
- `repository_branch` (String) Git branch.
- `repository_commit` (String) Git commit or tag.
- `repository_connector` (String) Repository connector reference (when source_type is git).
- `repository_path` (String) Path within the repository to the plugin inventory YAML.
- `source_type` (String) Source type for plugin inventory. One of: git, inline.


<a id="nestedblock--vars"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vars`

Required:

- `key` (String) Key is the identifier for the variable.
- `value` (String) Value of the variable. For secret value types this must be a Harness secret reference.
- `value_type` (String) Value type. One of: string, secret.

Optional:

- `file_name` (String) Filename to store the value in (used for file-backed variables).
